natural_language: Avisa-me quando a prateleira estiver vazia.
description: Gerar um alerta quando uma prateleira for detectada como vazia.

action.notification_message: Alerta: Prateleira vazia detectada na {zone} na localização {location}. Por favor, verifique e reponha.

assumptions: Zone filter is set to 'any' as no specific zone was mentioned.
Time filter is set to '0-23' (all day) as no specific time was mentioned.
Severity threshold for an empty shelf is assumed to be 'high'.
Location filter is set to 'any' as no specific shelf location (bottom, middle, top) was mentioned.
Alert level for 'Avisa-me' is assumed to be 'warning' for an empty shelf.
